title: McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: May 2026 - Calgary
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: May 2026 - Calgary
Please register now for the second installment of our 2026 Tax Tour, an interactive and practical discussion of the evolving legislative and judicial tax landscape in Canada. Our speakers will address the following topics:
- New Anti-Hybrid Mismatch Rules - The Second Package
- Recent Cases of Interest
The session will feature the following speakers:
- Matthew Kraemer , Partner and National Tax Group Regional Practice Lead - Calgary
- Stefanie Morand , Partner and National Tax Group Regional Practice Lead - Toronto
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca . This seminar may be eligible for CPA credits. More information can be found here . Note: This will take place in our Calgary office and the seminar will be given in English only. A lunch to suit most dietary concerns will be served.
- Matthew Kraemer Partner | Tax Group Regional Practice Lead - Calgary People.Offices.Singular Calgary
